name: pr-review-findings-first
description: Synthetic fixture for rewriting a PR review request into a findings-first review prompt.
source_prompts: find bugs and missing tests, not a summary

golden_profile.default_intent: The user wants a code-review stance that prioritizes concrete bugs, regressions, and missing tests.
golden_profile.preferred_autonomy: Inspect the diff and base branch directly; do not ask for a plan first.
golden_profile.evidence_standard: Findings need file/line references or exact diff evidence.
golden_profile.scope_preference: Review only the PR unless a base-branch issue directly affects it.

add_by_default: Compare against the target base branch.
Separate blockers from nits and questions.
avoid: Style-only feedback unless it hides a bug.

rough_prompt: review this pr and tell me what is wrong
golden_rewrite: Review the current PR against its base branch. Use the visible code-review or GitHub skill, such as $review or $github:github if available, to inspect the diff and relevant files. Lead with actionable findings ordered by severity, each with file/line evidence and why it matters. Focus on bugs, regressions, unsafe behavior, and missing tests. Put open questions after findings and keep any summary brief.
